summary: Tested website internationalization (i18n) for Footer, Home/Auctions page, VIP, Affiliate, and Purchases pages across 5 languages (de, en, sq, tr, fr). Footer translations work correctly for all languages. Main auction page has incomplete translations for French and some other languages - falls back to German.

ui_bugs.issue: Hardcoded 'BIETEN' text on line 279 instead of using translated ht.bid - FIX APPLIED

evidence.de: Schnelllinks, Rechtliches, Kontakt, Extras - all correct
evidence.en: Quick Links, Legal, Contact, Extras - all correct
evidence.sq: Lidhje të Shpejta, Ligjore, Kontakti, Ekstra - all correct
evidence.tr: Hızlı Linkler, Yasal, İletişim, Ekstralar - all correct
evidence.fr: Liens Rapides, Juridique, Contact, Extras - all correct

home_page_translations.note: Home page route (/) renders Auctions.js component, not Home.js

evidence.de: Live-Auktionen, JETZT BIETEN, Aktivität - all correct
evidence.en: Live Auctions, BID NOW, Activity - all correct
evidence.sq: Ankande Live found, but some elements still German
evidence.tr: Canlı Açık Artırmalar, TEKLİF VER found
evidence.fr: Enchères en Direct found, but auction page content shows German (incomplete translations)

vip_page_translations.evidence: Title and subtitle translate correctly (VIP Membership, Exclusive benefits). Plan benefits come from backend and show German text.

affiliate_page_translations.evidence: Affiliate Partner Program, per lead, How it works - all translate correctly

mobile_language_selector.evidence: Language grid with flag buttons works correctly. Clicking language button sets localStorage and reloads page.

french_auctionPage.impact: French users see German text on auction page instead of French

vip_plan_benefits.issue: VIP plan benefits text comes from backend database, not translated on frontend
vip_plan_benefits.impact: Plan benefits always show in German regardless of selected language

action_items: Add complete French translations for auctionPage in /app/frontend/src/i18n/translations.js
Verify Albanian (sq) and Turkish (tr) have complete auctionPage translations
Consider translating VIP plan benefits on frontend or storing translations in backend
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.js: Complete footerTexts translations for de, en, sq, tr, fr - WORKING
Home.js: Has homeTexts translations but Home.js is not used (route / renders Auctions.js)
Auctions.js: Uses t() function from LanguageContext, but French translations incomplete
VIP.js: Complete vipTexts translations, but plan benefits from backend not translated
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.js - Fixed hardcoded BIETEN to use ht.bid

success_rate.frontend: 80% - Footer and most pages translate correctly, but auction page has incomplete French translations

context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer translations work for all 5 languages (de, en, sq, tr, fr). Main auction page (Auctions.js) has incomplete French translations in /app/frontend/src/i18n/translations.js - the auctionPage object for French is missing many keys like filters, auctionOfDay, liveAuctions, bidNow, etc. The Home.js file is not used - route / renders Auctions.js instead. VIP plan benefits come from backend and are not translated on frontend.
